title: rutidea nigerica
intro: Rutidea nigerica, also known as the African Rutidea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae that is native to West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rutidea nigerica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Rutidea nigerica is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is also used in traditional medicine practices in West Africa.
